meaning: adj.邻居似的,睦邻的,友好的
examples: The visit is aimed to further strengthen the traditional good-neighborly relations.
First, we need to respect diversity of civilizations and promote good-neighborly relations.
I. Forge ahead into the Future and Promote the Good-neighborly Friendship and cooperation.
On Christmas Day, those neighborly officers will take to the streets of Newtown again.
But then again, there are a lot of people like that in Clark Fulton: Neighborly, but cautious.
